summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Judo klub Izola website updates. All 5 requested features verified and working correctly: gallery now has 6 photos, navigation scroll to top functionality, Iztok Babič displayed as trainer, youth group photo removed, and hero text contrast improved.

design_issues.issue: Missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility (console warnings)

passed_tests: Gallery event displays 6 photos total (verified in event card and thumbnails)
Navigation correctly scrolls to top on page change
O nas page shows Iztok Babič as 'Glavni trener'
O nas page does NOT contain youth group photos
Hero text has improved contrast with drop-shadow filters
All page navigation links working correctly
Gallery modal opens and closes properly
Photo thumbnails display correctly in gallery
